header.title: Rent Our Space
header.lead: Our historic campus is available to rent for weddings, concerts, classes, meetings, and community events.

intro: Over the years our spaces have hosted weddings and memorial services, musical recitals and concerts, dance classes, summer camps, educational programs, and board meetings. We'd be glad to host your event too.

items.title: Sanctuary
items.text: A beautiful, acoustically rich space ideal for weddings, concerts, and large gatherings.

items.title: Chapel
items.text: An intimate setting perfect for small ceremonies, recitals, and meetings.

items.title: Multipurpose Room
items.text: A flexible room for classes, workshops, rehearsals, and small groups.

policiesText: Please review our Facilities Usage Policies before submitting an inquiry.

cta.heading: Ready to inquire?
cta.text: Tell us about your event and we'll be in touch about availability and rates.
